name: etechflow/module-page-speed-optimizer
description: Magento 2 Page Speed Optimizer — Google PageSpeed Insights diagnostic from the admin, score + recommendation tracking, ETechFlow-feature mapping. Code optimization (CSS/JS/HTML minification, defer fonts, prioritize resource loading) ships in v1.1+. Standalone or bundled with ETechFlow Image Optimizer for the full performance suite.

suggest.etechflow/module-image-optimizer: Pair with IO so the PSI Diagnose recommendation mapper can point to specific image-optimization settings (e.g. 'Serve images in next-gen formats → Enable WebP conversion').
suggest.etechflow/module-next-day-eligibility: Bundle key activates this module too. Existing ETechFlow suite customer? Get this free.
suggest.etechflow/module-back-in-stock-notificat: Bundle key activates this module too.
